name: PhilateLister stamp catalog
author: Exergy ∞ LLC
description: Entity shard: concrete LLM model identifiers usable with a provider (appraisal, listing helpers). Runtime appraisal telemetry (every invocation, plus rate-limit counts) is stored in xframe/data/invocation_stats.json (separate file). Optional llm_model.feedback_events is for hand-curated or exported notes, not a mirror of that log.

entities.name: llm_model
entities.brief: Named model offering from a provider API.
entities.description: Rows describe which vendor model id to pass to the client (e.g. gemini-2.0-flash, openai/gpt-4o). has_free_tier and rate_limits are indicative documentation for operators; they are not enforced by this app. feedback_events is optional and separate from invocation_stats.json.

fields.name: model_id
fields.description: Stable id passed to the provider API (e.g. models/gemini-2.0-flash or OpenRouter route slug).

fields.name: name
fields.description: Human-readable model name for UI and logs.

fields.name: provider_id
fields.description: Upstream provider that serves this model.

fields.name: has_free_tier
fields.description: Whether the vendor documents a no-cost or trial quota for this model (informational only).

fields.name: rate_limits
fields.description: Operator notes: max RPM/TPM/RPD (or usage-dashboard cap), vendor doc links, token pricing pointers; empty if unknown.

fields.name: feedback_events
fields.description: Optional curated operator notes per catalog model. Not written by appraisal; use xframe/data/invocation_stats.json for automated invocation telemetry.

entities.name: llm_feedback_event
entities.brief: One operational feedback row for an LLM model (rate limits, quota errors).
entities.description: Aligns with invocation_stats.json event shape: actual_model_id, requested_model_id, char_counts, turn_count, function_calls.

fields.name: feedback_event_id
fields.description: Stable unique id for this event (e.g. UUID, or a deterministic hash of at_iso + invocation_id + message_preview prefix).

fields.name: prompt_id
fields.description: Prompt template id for the appraisal run (matches invocation_stats.events[].prompt_id and xframe/data/prompts/<prompt_id>.json).

fields.name: actual_model_id
fields.description: Vendor model id that served or failed (matches invocation_stats.events[].model).

fields.name: requested_model_id
fields.description: Invocation or router model when it differs from actual_model_id (matches invocation_stats.events[].requested_model). Omit when identical.

fields.name: char_counts
fields.description: UTF-16 lengths of user prompt text sent (in) and model completion returned (out); matches invocation_stats.events[].char_counts.

composite.name: in
composite.description: User prompt string length in UTF-16 code units.

composite.name: out
composite.description: Model reply text length in UTF-16 code units; 0 when the attempt failed before any body.

fields.name: turn_count
fields.description: Successful provider/model completions before failure (matches invocation_stats.events[].turn_count).

fields.name: at_iso
fields.description: When the event was observed (ISO-8601 timestamp).

fields.name: invocation_id
fields.description: Appraisal prompt_invocation.invocation_id when the event came from a run (e.g. numeral_cancel_identification_openrouter_free).

fields.name: reason_code
fields.description: Normalized reason derived from the upstream message (matches appraisal rate-limit bucketing).

fields.name: message_preview
fields.description: Truncated error or body text for operators (keep short; full payloads may live in CI logs).
